overview: A comprehensive logistics network optimization showcase website featuring 5 algorithm modules: Sorting/Delivery Prioritization, Graph Route Optimization, Greedy Vehicle Assignment, Dynamic Programming Cost Minimization, and Divide & Conquer Scalability. Interactive visualizations, performance analysis, and GitHub-ready code snippets.
features: Interactive delivery sorting with Merge Sort, Quick Sort, Heap Sort and VIP queue
Graph route visualization with Dijkstra and Bellman-Ford shortest paths
Vehicle assignment with greedy vs DP comparison
DP table visualization and Floyd-Warshall all-pairs shortest path
Divide & conquer zone division with scalability curves
Performance analysis charts comparing all algorithms
GitHub code page with syntax-highlighted algorithm implementations
